creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
brooks      2011-04-22 16:52:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio/squeezeboxserver Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    audio/squeezeboxserver/files patch-modules.conf 
  Log:
  Upgrade to 7.5.4 release.[1]
  
  Since squeezeboxserver depends on a specific version of Audio::Scan,
  also depend directly on that version (unfortunatly need to also
  depend on future versions so PORTREVISION bumps won't't break
  squeezeboxserver).
  
  Submitted by:   Mark Knight <markk at knigma org>[1]
  PR:             ports/156569
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.80      +7 -4      ports/audio/squeezeboxserver/Makefile
  1.38      +2 -2      ports/audio/squeezeboxserver/distinfo
  1.3       +3 -3      ports/audio/squeezeboxserver/files/patch-modules.conf
  1.25      +5 -4      ports/audio/squeezeboxserver/pkg-plist
